description: This file defines the 'RecipesScreen' widget for a Flutter app, which displays a list of recipes with search, filter, and favorites functionality. It includes UI components such as search input, filter chips, grid view of recipes, and navigation to recipe details.

classes.name: RecipesScreen
classes.description: A StatelessWidget that displays a list of recipes with filtering and search options, and navigates to recipe details on tap.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds the UI for the recipes screen including search, filters, and grid of recipe cards.

classes.name: _FiltersRow
classes.description: A widget that renders filter chips for categories and favorites toggle.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds a row of filter chips for categories and favorites.

classes.name: _EmptyState
classes.description: A widget that displays an empty state message when no recipes match filters.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Builds a centered container with icon, message, and button to clear filters.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Constructs the widget tree for the RecipesScreen, including the app bar, filters, search box, recipe grid, and empty state.
